title: haronga febrifuga
intro: Haronga febrifuga, also known as the fever tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, particularly in the regions of Cameroon and Gabon. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its ability to induce sweating and reduce fever. Its health benefits include treating conditions such as malaria, typhoid, and other infectious diseases, as well as reducing inflammation and relieving pain. Haronga febrifuga can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to aid in the treatment of various health issues.
